title: botrychium triangularifolium
intro: Botrychium triangularifolium, also known as the American grape fern, is a type of rare and unique plant belonging to the Ophioglossaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Botrychium triangularifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by drying the fronds and roots, which can then be used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
